refnamediv.refpurpose: Find maximum plateaus with a contrast threshold.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imextendedmax(image, height); out = imextendedmax(image, height, connectivity)

listitem.para: Nonnegative minimum contrast to a lower neighbor.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imextendedmax filters local maximum plateaus by their neighboring intensity contrast.

refsection.title: Examples
